test: chromium > login.spec.ts > Login > Valid login succeeds and lands on inventory page

aiExplanation.summary: The test expected the URL to change to the inventory page after login, but the browser remained on the base SauceDemo URL, indicating login did not succeed or navigation was not awaited.
aiExplanation.likelyCause: Most likely the login form submission failed silently (wrong locator/timing for username, password, or login button) or an assertion/error message was present on the page that prevented navigation, and the test did not wait for the click action or navigation to complete before asserting the URL.
aiExplanation.suggestedFix: Add explicit waits for the login button click and subsequent navigation (e.g., use Promise.all with page.waitForURL or waitForNavigation alongside the click), verify the locators for username/password/login button are correct and unique, and check for any error banner on the page after submission to confirm credentials were accepted before asserting the URL.
